positive: A whimsical illustration of a fox and a badger sharing a picnic in a glowing bioluminescent forest. Detailed digital painting, storybook style, volumetric lighting, soft pastel colors, highly rendered, Art Nouveau influence, by Beatrix Potter and Studio Ghibli.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, oversaturated, photorealistic
